scope.purpose: Preserve low-confidence retailer fitment leads for later comparison with official factory color evidence.

limitations: RockAuto describes currently cataloged service products and fitments, not Chevrolet factory color availability.
A model-year page can omit most official colors.
A universal product can appear without any paint code and must never become a code candidate.
Retailer labels can differ from Chevrolet's official model-year color names.
Price, stock, and product presence are volatile and are not historical availability evidence.
No public catalog API or catalog-data reuse license was identified during this audit.

retrieval_contract.reason_for_fresh_get: The interactive catalog DOM can retain hidden branches from a prior configuration.

response_parsing.configuration_source: The model route exposes engine-specific hrefs and HTML-escaped nav-node JSON with make, year, model, carcode, and engine fields.
response_parsing.product_identity_source: Each listing exposes HTML-escaped listing_data_essential JSON with carcode, parttype, and partkey plus listing_data_supplemental JSON with catalogname and partnumber.
response_parsing.paint_assertion_source: Color labels and paint codes are visible listing prose, not JSON-LD. Preserve the complete raw description before parsing any code tokens.
response_parsing.challenge_detection_note: The ordinary catalog shell contains dormant account-creation CAPTCHA markup. Do not treat the word captcha alone as a blocking challenge. Require an HTTP error, challenge title, missing expected catalog structure, or equivalent positive signal.

responsible_retrieval.recommended_mode: low-volume, human-triggered retrieval or retrieval with permission
responsible_retrieval.robots_observation: The generic robots group did not disallow /en/catalog/ or /en/moreinfo.php on the audit date. Robots directives are not a reuse license. /info/ was disallowed and was not fetched.

supplemental_configuration_checks.reason: The exact resolved listing URL and uncoded rows were not retained in the audit record.
The exact resolved listing URL was not retained in the audit record.
The exact resolved listing URL was not retained in the audit record.

engine_parity_checks.scope_caveat: Only the three named configurations were checked. Do not infer parity for the five untested 1969 Camaro engine configurations or for any other model-year.
This model-year parity result does not authorize collapsing cc-scoped fitments or assuming parity in another model-year.
The 2.0L L4 and naturally aspirated 6.2L V8 configurations were not checked. Do not infer parity for them or for another model-year.

product_code_crosswalk_assertions.product_listing_text_raw: GM Original Equipment; Summit White/Olympic White (WA8624) Four-In-One Touch-Up Paint - .5 oz Pen

products.selection_prompt_raw: Choose Color: Choose Color at Left

official_completeness_comparisons.comparison_note: The official chart lists 15 solid colors. The RockAuto C10 configuration lists one coded touch-up product. RockAuto's WA8555 Black is not a substitute for Chevrolet's printed code 86 Black, Midnight.

The official chart lists 10 standalone colors. The RockAuto configuration lists four coded products. Retailer WA codes are not matched to the official U-suffixed chart codes without an official crosswalk.
The official per-trim palette union contains 10 colors. The RockAuto configuration lists only Olympic White WA8624 and Black WA8555. Retailer naming is not promoted over Chevrolet's official names.

official_completeness_comparisons.official_source_locator: PDF page 46, printed page 45, Chevrolet Camaro AVAILABLE EXTERIOR COLORS
official_completeness_comparisons.comparison_note: The counts happen to match, but the source-literal name sets do not. RockAuto omits official names and supplies other product labels. No label or code is promoted without an official crosswalk.

official_completeness_comparisons.official_palette_scope: Redesigned Tahoe Base, LS, and LT palette union; carryover Limited and carrier-qualified Z71 programs excluded. The separate Chevrolet Z71 scan names Light Pewter Metallic, Indigo Blue Metallic, Emerald Green Metallic, and Victory Red.
official_completeness_comparisons.official_source_locator: PDF page 18, printed Product Information page 9, Exterior Paint
official_completeness_comparisons.comparison_note: The official page completely enumerates the redesigned Tahoe Base/LS and LT palettes, but not the carryover Z71 palette. The sampled 5.3L configuration is retained as a retailer lead for the redesigned vehicle only. Similar names are not crosswalks.

official_completeness_comparisons.official_source_locator: PDF page 12, printed page 10, Vehicle Overview - Color and Trim - Exterior Colors
official_completeness_comparisons.comparison_note: The official complete palette contains nine names. RockAuto lists seven coded products and shares only Victory Red as an exact source-literal name. No retailer code is promoted because the official page prints no codes.

official_completeness_comparisons.official_source_locator: PDF page 11, printed page 3, Product Information exterior-color sentence
official_completeness_comparisons.comparison_note: The official complete palette contains nine names. RockAuto lists five coded products and shares only Black as an exact source-literal name. Similar bronze, blue, silver, and white labels are not crosswalks.

publication_policy.required_corroboration: An official Chevrolet or General Motors source with a model-year scope and exact locator.

proposed_normalized_tables.grain: one product listed for one cc configuration at one observation
one unverified cc fitment and retailer-code lead
